sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fixed wiki-rendered `<h2>` sub-headings inside 'Annotation'-style column cells (e.g. '== Known performances ==') becoming permanently non-collapsible after the first sort or filter. renderFinalTable()/renderGroupedTable() replace table rows with cloneNode(true) copies on every sort/filter re-render, which copies the collapsed-h2 marker classes and icon but not the click listener — makeH2sCollapsible() (which normally sets these up) only runs after the initial full-page render and a disk-load, never after a sort/filter, so the cloned headings looked processed but were inert. A new `_rewireNestedTableH2Toggles()` re-attaches working click handlers to these nested headings after every sort/filter re-render, without touching page-level h2 sections (Genres, Tags, Relationships, …) or resetting any section's manually-toggled state.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Made the collapsed-cell clamp height of 'Annotation'-style columns configurable via a new `sa_annotation_column_max_height_em` setting (default 5.6em, ~4 lines — the same value used in WIP.1), instead of a hardcoded CSS value.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Added a new '📝 ANNOTATION COLUMNS' settings section: `sa_enable_annotation_collapse` (checkbox, default on) toggles the WIP.1 free-text collapse/height-clamp behaviour on/off for 'Annotation'-style columns, and `sa_annotation_column_max_width` (number, default 480) makes the auto-resize width cap configurable.

The auto-resize width cap for these columns is now always active, independent of `sa_enable_annotation_collapse` — even with collapsing disabled, a long annotation no longer stretches the column to its unwrapped width.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: Annotation-style columns declared in `collapsableColumns` (report-detail's AnnotationsPlaces/AnnotationsReleases sub-reports, the instrument 'Annotations' report category) are now collapsible: free-text cells are height-clamped behind a ▶/▼ 'show more/less' toggle, sharing the same column-header and global mass-toggle buttons, filter-match highlighting, and expand-state persistence as existing list-type collapsable columns (Catalog#, Label, …).
Auto-resize (↔️ Resize / Ctrl+R) no longer sizes these free-text columns to a paragraph's unwrapped single-line width — their measured width is now capped, matching the new height-clamped rendering.

Tightened `collapsableColumns`' list-cell detection to only match a `<ul><li>` that is a direct child of the `<td>`, fixing a latent bug where a wiki-rendered bullet/numbered list embedded inside free-text annotation prose could be mistaken for a script-generated multi-row list and partially hidden.
